entries.KEEP_CONNECTION_NOTE:
Keeps the online connection active
while the plugin menu is open.
entries.HIDE_DESIGN_OUTFITS_NOTE:
Prevents design pattern outfits
from appearing in inventory.
entries.SAVE_BACKUP_UNSAVED_CHANGES:
Unsaved changes will not be included in the backup.
Please save your game before proceeding.
entries.SAVE_RESTORE_CHECKPOINT:
Please use Checkpoint to restore your save backups.
You can either get it through Universal-Updater or via this link:
https://github.com/BernardoGiordano/Checkpoint/releases
entries.SAVE_DELETE_CONFIRM:
Are you sure you want to delete the backup "%s"?
This action cannot be undone.
entries.SET_FOLIAGE_SEASON_NOTE: Change the season of the town's foliage. This makes bushes bloom out of season for example, or have trees be in a different seasonal state.
entries.PRETENDO_CODES_NOTE: Pretendo network tools for viewing connected players and checking PIA logger status.
entries.PLAYERS_IN_SESSION_NOTE: Lists all players in the current online session with their name, friend code, PID, and NAT info.
entries.PIA_LOGGER_OPTIONS_NOTE: Shows whether the PIA networking patterns were found in memory.
entries.TREESIZE_SET: Successfully set town tree growth stage to %d.
entries.CSTICK_COORD_MOD_NOTE: Similar to Coordinate Control but it uses the new 3DS' C-Stick.
entries.DEFAULT_CODES_DISABLE_WARNING:
Warning
Disabling these default codes can cause problems in the plugin or game.
This change is not saved. You must disable them again each time you start the plugin.

Do you really want to continue?
entries.KEY_QR_MACHINE_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose whether to unlock or lock the QR machine:
entries.KEY_CATALOG_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose whether to fill or clear your catalog collection:
entries.SONG_LIST_CLEAR_SUCCESS: Successfully cleared the K.K. song list.
entries.SONG_LIST_FILL_SUCCESS: Successfully filled the K.K. song list.
entries.KEY_SONG_LIST_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose whether to fill or clear your K.K. song collection:
entries.DREAM_CODE_SET: Successfully set the displayed dream code to %04X-%04X-%04X.
entries.KEY_ENZYKLOPEDIA_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose whether to fill or clear your encyclopedia:
entries.EMOTION_LIST_SET_SUCCESS: Successfully filled all emote slots with emotion ID %02X.
entries.KEY_EMOTION_LIST_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose how to edit your emotion list:
entries.KEY_DESIGN_DUMP_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose whether to back up, restore, or delete a design backup:
entries.TPC_DUMPER_RESTORE_CURRENT: Select a TPC picture to restore to the current player. This will overwrite the current picture.
entries.KEY_TPC_SELECT_BACKUP_PLAYER: Select the player whose TPC picture you want to back up:
entries.KEY_TPC_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose whether to back up, restore, or delete a TPC picture backup:
entries.KEY_PLAYER_BACKUP_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose whether to back up, restore, or delete a player backup:
entries.RANDOM_OUTFIT_WARNING:
Randomizing the outfit will replace your current hat, glasses, shirt, pants, socks, and shoes.

Are you sure?
entries.RANDOM_PLAYER_WARNING:
Randomizing the full player will replace your current outfit, hair, face, eye color, and tan.

Are you sure?
entries.KEY_PLAYER_MOD_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose which part of your appearance to edit:
entries.CUSTOM_HAIR_EYE_CHOOSE_ACTION: Choose how to manage custom hair and eye colors:
entries.CUSTOM_HAIR_ID_FIX_NOTE:
Custom hair colors only work with Hair Color ID 00.

Current Hair Color ID: %02X
Change it automatically now?
entries.CUSTOM_EYE_ID_FIX_NOTE:
Custom eye colors only work with Eye Color ID 01.

Current Eye Color ID: %02X
Change it automatically now?
entries.SAVE_CODES_NOTE: Edit town save data, backups, buildings, shops, and other long-term town progress.
entries.MOVEMENT_CODES_NOTE: Movement cheats for warping, collision, speed, visibility, and player positioning.
entries.INVENTORY_CODES_NOTE: Spawn, copy, clear, save, and customize inventory items and item-related menus.
entries.PLAYER_CODES_NOTE: Player-focused cheats for appearance, status, live info, and player save data.
entries.PLAYER_SAVE_CODES_NOTE: Edit persistent player data like appearance, TPC, designs, catalog, emotions, and backups.
entries.ANIMATION_CODES_NOTE: Control animations, emotions, and animation targets for yourself or other players.
entries.SEEDING_CODES_NOTE: Map editing and item placement tools, including pickup, drop, tree, and seeding cheats.
entries.SEED_CODES_NOTE: Pickup and map seeding tools for placing, replacing, removing, and painting items.
entries.DROP_CODES_NOTE: Dropper cheats for placing items instantly, in patterns, or from selected inventory slots.
entries.TREE_CODES_NOTE: Tree behavior cheats for fruit drops, chopping, and replacing tree rewards.
entries.MONEY_CODES_NOTE: Adjust Bells, coupons, medals, badges, and turnip prices.
entries.ISLAND_CODES_NOTE: Island cheats for access, tours, shop slots, layouts, medals, and island backups.
entries.NPC_CODES_NOTE: Select, move, rotate, animate, and teleport loaded NPCs.
entries.ENV_CODES_NOTE: World and environment cheats for weather, lighting, grass, flowers, buried items, bugs, and fish.
entries.FISH_CODES_NOTE: Fishing tweaks that make fish bite faster and stop them from getting scared.
entries.INSECT_CODES_NOTE: Spawn insects manually or stop them from fleeing.
entries.EXTRA_CODES_NOTE: Extra utility, chat, fun, and world interaction cheats that do not fit the main folders.
entries.CHAT_CODES_NOTE: Chat tools for copy/paste, forced sending, commands, translation, and keyboard tweaks.
entries.FUN_CODES_NOTE: Mostly playful cheats for size, poses, camera control, pictures, and visual effects.
entries.MISC_CODES_NOTE: Assorted gameplay and engine tweaks like room reloads, speed changes, FOV, and movement behavior.
entries.DEFAULT_CODES_NOTE: Default compatibility and safety patches that define how core cheats and item systems behave.
entries.DEV_CODES_NOTE: Developer and debugging tools for memory, functions, save flags, and experimental features.
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_SAVE_MENU: Choose which menu should override the save menu:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_ITEM_SETTINGS: Choose an item setting to toggle:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_CUSTOM_SET_ACTION: Choose whether to back up, restore, or delete a custom inventory set:
entries.GET_SET_RESTORE_WARNING:
Loading a set will replace all items in your inventory.

Are you sure?
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_CUSTOM_BUTTONS: Choose a custom button to appear in the item pop-up menu:
entries.KEY_MUSEUM_SELECT_PLAYER: Choose the player who will appear as the donor of the museum collection:
entries.SEARCH_ITEM_NOTE: Search for an item by name and place the selected result into the next free inventory slot.
entries.BUILDING_MOD_DELETE_SUCCESS:
Successfully removed the building %s.
Restart the game to apply the collision changes.
entries.BUILDING_MOD_MOVE_SUCCESS:
Successfully moved the building %s to your position.
Restart the game to apply the collision changes.
entries.BUILDING_MOD_PLACE_SUCCESS: Successfully placed the building %s at your position.
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_TREE_SIZE: Choose the town tree size to apply:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_BACKUP_ACTION: Choose whether to create, restore, or delete a save backup:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_BULLETIN_ACTION: Choose whether to back up, restore, or delete a bulletin board message backup:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_NATIVE_FRUIT: Choose the fruit to set as your town's native fruit:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_PWP_STATE: Choose whether to unlock or lock all public work projects:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_GRASS_TYPE: Choose the grass shape to use for your town:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_CAMPSITE_ACTION: Choose whether to set or remove the current campsite villager:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_HOUSE_ACTION: Choose how to manage this player's house:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_HOUSE_EXTERIOR: Choose which exterior part to edit:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_BUILDING_ACTION: Choose whether to place a new building, move an existing one, or remove one:
entries.KEY_CHOOSE_MUSEUM_ACTION: Choose whether to fill or clear the museum collection:
entries.PWP_UNLOCK_ALL_SUCCESS: Successfully unlocked all public works projects!
entries.PWP_LOCK_ALL_SUCCESS: Successfully locked all public works projects!
entries.BUILDING_MOD_NO_DESIGN_STAND_FREE: You've reached the design stand limit!
entries.AURORALIGHTS_RELOAD_ROOM: Reload the room to see the aurora effect.
entries.GRASS_EDITOR_ONLY_IN_TOWN: Grass editing only works in town.
entries.SPOT_STATE_TOO_MANY: Error: Too many locked spots already exist!
entries.DROP_RADIUS_ONLY_OUTDOORS: Drop radius can only be changed outdoors.
entries.BADGE_SETTER_STATS_QUESTION:
Do you want to update the matching badge stats?
(This will change all badge-related game stats.)
entries.FAST_PLAYER_SELECT_INFO: Enable "Fast Player Select" before entering Isabelle's greeting room.
entries.CHAT_TEXT_2_I_COPY_ERROR: Failed to copy the chat text.
entries.MENU_CHANGER_INVALID_ROOM: The custom save menu cannot be used in this room.
entries.ONLY_OFFLINE: This feature is only available offline.
entries.PLAYER_TELEPORT_ALL_TELEPORTED: Teleported all players to your location.
entries.ROOM_LOADER_ERROR: Failed to warp to that room.
entries.NPC_TELEPORTED_TO_YOU: Teleported the selected NPC to your location.
entries.HOUSE_EDITOR_ONLY_OFFLINE: This feature is only available offline.
entries.HOUSE_EDITOR_SECRET_STORAGE_UNLOCKED: Secret Storage and the furniture mover are now unlocked!
entries.HOUSE_EDITOR_SECRET_STORAGE_RELOAD:
Open the furniture mover tutorial?
You'll be taken to the tutorial and returned to Main Street afterward.
entries.ACRE_EDITOR_HALF_ACRE_ERROR: Half-acre IDs can't be used in full-acre slots.
entries.ACRE_EDITOR_SAVE_QUIT: Save and close the game to apply your changes.
entries.CHECKS_INVALID_BADGE: Invalid badge type. Cannot display the badge correctly.
entries.CHECKS_SEARCH_NOT_SUPPORTED: The search function is currently not supported.
entries.CHAT_NO_ITEM_FOUND: No item found with that name.
entries.BUILDING_MOD_SAVE_DATA_NOT_LOADED: Failed to load building save data.
entries.BUILDING_MOD_NOT_IN_OWN_TOWN: This only works in your own town.
entries.BUILDING_MOD_NO_SLOT_FREE: No free building slots are available.
entries.EXPRESSION_MOD_NOTE: Lets you override your facial expression (eyes and mouth).
entries.WATER_FLOWERS_NOTE: Water every flower in the current area.
entries.WATER_FLOWER_QUESTION: Water all flowers in the current area?
entries.WEED_REMOVER_NOTE: Remove every weed in the current area.
entries.REMOVE_WEED_QUESTION: Remove all weeds in the current area?
entries.ITEMS_DONT_DISSAPPEAR_NOTE: Keeps items from disappearing overnight when they are placed in invalid spots.
entries.KEEP_GRASS_STATE_NOTE: Prevents grass wear from changing, even after reloading the game.
entries.IDLE_AFTER_TREE_SHAKE_OR_CUT: Return to Idle After Tree Actions
entries.CONVERT_FLOWER_FROM_SEED_ITEM_TO_NORMAL_: Convert Seed Flowers to Normal Flowers
entries.SET_CUSTOM_SPRITES_FOR_PRO_DESIGNS: Use Custom Sprites for Pro Designs
entries.CUSTOM_DUMP_NOTE: Set a custom memory range, then dump, restore, or delete that backup.
entries.CALL_FUNCTION_NOTE: Lets you call in-game functions by memory address.
entries.UNLOCK_CRO_REGION_NOTE:
R + DPadUp: Unlock the selected CRO region
R + DPadDown: Lock the selected CRO region
entries.FISH_THROWER_NOTE: Throw fish or place them in a player's hand.
entries.FISH_THROWER_KEY1:
Tap: open options
Hold: perform action
entries.WAND_ABILITY_NOTE:
Adds special abilities to certain wands.
Blue Wand: none
Green Wand: instantly revives wilted flowers
Pink Wand: none
Yellow Wand: none
Flower Fairy Wand: instantly grows trees
Kiki and Lala Wand: none
entries.LIGHT_SWITCH_TOGGLER_NOTE:
Lets you toggle room lights.
L + DPadUp: Toggle the current room
L + DPadRight: Set room ID
L + DPadLeft: Toggle the selected room
entries.SPAWN_INSECT_NOTE:
Spawn or despawn insects. Up to 12 insects can exist at once.

R + DPadUp: Spawn insect
R + DPadDown: Despawn all insects

Use the keyboard icon to choose which insect to spawn.
entries.INSECT_CANT_SCARE_NOTE: Prevents insects from fleeing when you get close, run nearby, or miss with the net.
entries.RADIO_PLAYER_NOTE: Shows you the currently playing music title.
entries.CHAT_COMMANDS_NOTE:
Enable built-in chat commands.
A:XX -> Animation
S:XXX -> Snake
M:XXX -> Music
E:XX -> Emotion
I:XXXX -> Item
I:XXXXF:YYYY -> Item with flag
entries.CHAT_BUTTON_NOTE: Adds on-screen chat buttons for copy, paste, cut, delete, and send.
entries.CHAT_TRANSLATION_OPTIONS_NOTE: Configure automatic translation of sent and received chat messages.
entries.SAVE_PLAYER_NO: No player loaded. Please load a player first.
entries.TOWN_NAME_CHANGER_NOTE: Changes your town name in the save data.
entries.TOWN_NAME_CHANGER_ENTER_NAME:
Change Town Name

Enter a new town name (max 8 characters):
entries.SAVE_BACKUP_NOTE: Create, restore, or delete backups of your save data.
entries.SAVE_DUMPER_DUMP:
Save Backup

Enter a name for the new backup.
entries.BULL_BOARD_DUMPER_NOTE: Back up or restore bulletin board messages.
entries.BULLETIN_BOARD_DUMPER_DUMP:
Bulletin Board Backup

Enter a name for the new backup.
entries.TREESIZE_NOTE: Set your town tree growth stage by adjusting playtime and days played.
entries.PWP_UNLOCK_NOTE: Unlocks or locks all public work projects.
entries.GRASS_CHANGER_NOTE: Changes the grass pattern used in your town.
entries.CARAVAN_SET_NOTE: Sets the villager for each campground caravan slot.
entries.CAMPING_SET_NOTE: Set or remove the current campsite villager.
entries.SHOP_UPGRADE_NOTE: Unlocks or resets Main Street Shop progression and related facilities.
entries.HOUSE_EDITOR_NOTE: Build, upgrade, finish, and customize a player's house interior and exterior.
entries.HOUSE_EDITOR_ALL_FINISHED: All rooms are already at maximum size!
entries.HOUSE_EDITOR_DOOR_CUSTOM_NOTE:
Use an arched door?

Yes = arched
No or B = square
entries.HOUSE_EDITOR_PLAYER_NOT_READY: %s must finish the first day before editing their house.
entries.QR_MACHINE_NOTE: Unlock or lock the QR machine.
entries.BUILDING_MOD_NOTE: Place, move, or remove buildings in your town.
entries.FILL_MUSEUM_NOTE: Fill or clear the museum collection.
entries.MAYOR_PERMIT_NOTE: Completes all mayor permit requirements and sets approval to 100%.
entries.REAL_TIME_ACRE_NOTE:
Tap a town map square to change its acre ID.
Save and restart the game to apply all map changes.
entries.CANT_PUSH_NOTE: Prevents villagers and other players from pushing you.
entries.COORD_MOD_NOTE: Move your player by adjusting their coordinates.
entries.COORD_MOD_ENTER_SPEED:
Enter movement speed:
%d is the default.
entries.MOON_JUMP_NOTE: Use the hotkeys to move up or down.
entries.TOUCH_WARP_NOTE: Open the map, then tap a spot to warp there.
entries.WALK_OVER_NOTE: Turns off collision so you can walk through obstacles.
entries.MOVEMENT_CHANGE_NOTE: Use the hotkey to switch between walking and swimming.
entries.WALK_PARTICLE_CHANGE_NOTE: Choose which particle effect appears while you walk.
entries.PLAYER_TELEPORT_NOTE: Bring a selected player, or all players, to your location.
entries.VISIBILITY_MOD_NOTE: Change how other players see you.
entries.SPEED_MOD_NOTE: Set a speed value to increase your walking, running, and swimming speed.
entries.SPEED_MOD_ERROR: Enter a value of 15 or less.
entries.ROOM_WARPING_NOTE: Use the hotkey to choose a room ID and warp there.
entries.SHOVEL_KNOCKBACK_NOTE: Prevents knockback when you hit rocks or walls with a shovel.
entries.TEXT_2_ITEM_NOTE: Spawn an item by ID into the next free inventory slot, or copy the item beneath you into your inventory.
entries.TEXT_2_ITEM_SEARCH_ERR3: No items found. Try a different search.
entries.DUPE_ITEMS_NOTE: Copy the item in slot 1 to slot 2 or to every inventory slot.
entries.CATALOG_TO_POCKET_NOTE: Open the catalog and add items directly to your inventory.
entries.CHAT_T2I_NOTE: Type an item ID into chat, then use the hotkey without sending the message.
entries.CLEAR_INV_NOTE: Remove every item from your inventory.
entries.REMOVE_INV_WARNING:
Clear Inventory
This will remove every item from your inventory.
Press Yes to continue or No to cancel.
entries.ITEM_SETTINGS_NOTE: Toggle item behavior cheats like showing off any item, infinite use, or eating any item.
entries.SAVE_MENU_CHANGER_NOTE: Replace the save menu with another menu.
entries.SAVE_MENU_CHANGER_ENTER_ID: Enter a menu ID to open instead:
entries.GET_SET_NOTE: Load a preset inventory set or back up and restore your own.
entries.GET_SET_DUMP:
Custom Inventory Set

Enter a name for the new backup.
entries.GET_SET_RESTORE: Choose a custom set to restore.
entries.CUSTOM_BUTTON_NOTE:
Add custom actions to item pop-up menus.
A maximum of 6 buttons can appear on one item, including Quit.
If a custom button doesn't appear, disable another one.
entries.NAME_CHANGER_NOTE: Change your player's name in the save data.
entries.NAME_CHANGER_ENTER_NAME:
Player Name Editor

Enter a new player name (max 8 characters):
entries.PLAYER_APPEARANCE_NOTE: Change your hairstyle, hair color, eyes, tan, gender, or outfit.
entries.RANDOM_PLAYER_NOTE: Randomize your outfit or your entire player. Back up your player first if you want to keep the current look.
entries.PLAYER_BACKUP_NOTE: Back up or restore your player save data.
entries.RANDOM_PLAYER_DUMP:
Player Backup

Enter a name for the new backup.
entries.TPC_MESSAGE_NOTE: Edit the text shown on your TPC.
entries.TPC_MESSAGE_ENTER_NAME:
TPC Message

Enter a new TPC message (max 26 characters):
entries.TPC_SETTINGS_NOTE:
Back up or restore a TPC picture.
Custom TPC images must be under 5024 bytes, use JPG format, and be 64x104 pixels.
entries.TPC_DUMPER_NAME:
TPC Picture Backup Manager

Enter a name for the new backup.
entries.DESIGN_DUMP_NOTE: Back up or restore your designs.
entries.DESIGN_DUMP_NAME:
Design Backup restore

Enter a name for the new backup.
entries.EMOTION_LIST_NOTE: Fill your emotion list, clear it, or set every slot to the same emotion.
entries.EMOTION_LIST_TYPE_ID: Enter the emotion ID to use:
entries.ENCY_LIST_NOTE: Fill or clear your bug, fish, and sea creature encyclopedia entries.
entries.DREAM_CODE_NOTE:
Change the dream code displayed in your TPC.
This will not replace your dream code! Other players will see the custom dream code in your TPC, but it will not function as a new dream code!
entries.DREAM_CODE_ENTER_ID:
Enter the dream code.
Type 4 digits at a time, 3 times, with no spaces.
entries.DEBUG_MENU_NOTE: Unlock the unused Census Menu inside the TPC to view extra game stats.
entries.SONG_LIST_NOTE: Fill or clear your K.K. song collection in your music player.
entries.FILL_CATALOG_NOTE: Fill or clear your catalog collection.
entries.PLAYER_INFO_NOTE: Show live information about your player.
entries.CUSTOM_HAIR_EYE_NOTE:
Set custom hair and eye colors with RGB values.
Choose Save to keep the current colors for future launches.
These colors currently work only with Hair Color ID 0 and Eye Color ID 1.
entries.CUSTOM_ENTER_HAIR: Enter an RGB color code for hair:
entries.CUSTOM_ENTER_EYE: Enter an RGB color code for eyes:
entries.WEAR_HELMET_NOTE: Lets you wear a helmet and an accessory at the same time. Put on the accessory first.
entries.PLAYER_LOADER_NOTE: Lets you load one of your players without restarting the game.
entries.PLAYERS_ON_MAP_NOTE: Shows every loaded player on the map.
entries.NEVER_BEDHEAD_NOTE: Prevents your hair from getting messy when starting the game.
entries.FAINT_NOTE: Make your player faint with the hotkey.
entries.PLAYER_SELECTOR_NOTE: Select another loaded player as the target for animations and similar actions.
entries.ANTI_ANIM_NOTE: Prevents other players from forcing animations on you.
entries.ANIMATION_MOD_NOTE: Run animations, tool actions, sounds, emotions, or appearance effects on yourself or the selected player.
entries.ANIMATIONS_ANIM_NOTE:
Choose an animation to use.
Enter the animation ID:
entries.ANIMATIONS_TOOL_NOTE:
Choose a tool animation to use.
Enter the tool ID:
entries.ANIMATIONS_SNAKE_NOTE:
Choose a snake animation to use.
Enter the snake ID:
entries.ANIMATIONS_EMOTE_NOTE:
Choose an emotion animation to use.
Enter the emotion ID:
entries.ANIMATIONS_SOUND_NOTE:
Choose the sound or music to use.
Enter the sound or music ID:
entries.ANIMATIONS_APPEAR_NOTE1:
Choose the temporary appearance effect to use.
Enter the hairstyle ID:
entries.ANIMATIONS_APPEAR_NOTE2:
Choose the temporary appearance effect to use.
Enter the hair color ID:
entries.ANIMATIONS_APPEAR_NOTE3:
Choose the temporary appearance effect to use.
Enter the eye color ID:
entries.EMOTION_LOOP_NOTE: Loop the current emotion while holding the hotkey.
entries.IDLE_NOTE: Reset your player's current animation while holding the hotkey.
entries.ANIM_ON_ALL_NOTE: Apply the current animation mode to all players at once. This temporarily uses online mode behavior to avoid issues.
entries.PICK_SEEDER_NOTE: Pick up, remove, or replace items with different pickup interaction modes.
entries.WALK_SEEDER_NOTE: Remove items automatically as you walk over them.
entries.FIREWORK_SEEDER_NOTE: Change which item appears when you drop a firework.
entries.FIREWORK_SEEDER_ENTER_ID: Enter the item ID to spawn from fireworks:
entries.MAP_EDITOR_NOTE: Place, remove, copy, and paint items on the map with precise tile control.
entries.ALL_SEEDER_NOTE: Temporarily replace nearly every item interaction with the selected item while holding the hotkey.
entries.ITEM_SEQUENCER_NOTE:
Cycle through a custom list of items when using dropper cheats.
Example:
If the list contains 335B and 0070, each drop alternates between those two items.
entries.ITEM_SEQUENCER_ENTER_ID:
Enter a new item ID.
Press B to remove the selected item.
entries.DROP_MODS_NOTE: Shared settings for the different dropper cheats.
entries.DROP_MODS_ENTER_ID:
Enter the item ID to replace.
Use 0xFFFFFFFF to replace everything.
entries.DROP_ITEMS_NOTE: Drop the selected item instantly without opening the inventory.
entries.AUTO_DROP_NOTE: Automatically place the selected item around you. The default area is 3x3 and can be changed with Drop Modifiers.
entries.TOUCH_DROP_NOTE: Touch the map screen to place the selected item at that position.
entries.SLOT_DROP_NOTE: Drop the item currently selected in your inventory, once or continuously.
entries.INF_FRUIT_TREE_NOTE: Fruit trees keep dropping fruit without running out.
entries.AXE_TREE_SHAKE_NOTE: Tree shaking behaves like chopping with an axe.
entries.FRUIT_TREE_MOD_NOTE: Replace all fruit tree drops with the item ID you enter.
entries.INST_TREE_CHOP_NOTE: Trees fall after a single hit.
entries.WALLET_NOTE: Set how many Bells are in your wallet.
entries.BANK_NOTE: Set how many Bells are in your bank account.
entries.BADGES_NOTE: Set every badge to gold, silver, bronze, or none.
entries.MEDALS_NOTE: Set how many island medals you have.
entries.TURNIPS_NOTE: Set every turnip buy and sell price for the current week to the same value.
entries.UNLOCK_ISLAND_NOTE: Unlock or lock access to Tortimer Island and Club Tortimer.
entries.FILL_INV_ORE_NOTE: Makes Ore Hunting Tours count as if your inventory were filled with bonus ore, giving you the maximum score.
entries.FILL_INV_FRUIT_NOTE: Makes the Labyrinth Tour count as if you already collected all required fruit.
entries.FREE_KAPPN_NOTE: Ride to the island without paying Bells.
entries.ISLAND_SHOP_MOD_NOTE:
Change the items shown in the island shop.
For others to see the changes you must be the first person on the island!
entries.ISLAND_SHOP_MOD_ENTER_ID: Enter an item ID for island shop slot %d:
entries.ALL_TOURS_NOTE: Unlocks all the island tours for your current island session.
entries.ISLAND_ACRE_NOTE: Use the keyboard icon to enter 16 acre IDs. Acres are ordered left to right, top to bottom. Enable this before arriving on a new island. This will only work if you are the first person on the island.
entries.ISLAND_BUILDING_NOTE: Use the keyboard icon to edit the two island buildings. Enable this before arriving on a new island. This will only work if you are the first person on the island.
entries.ISLAND_BUILDING_ENTER_ID: Enter the building ID for slot
entries.ISLAND_BUILDING_ENTER_X: Enter the X coordinate for slot
entries.ISLAND_BUILDING_ENTER_Y: Enter the Y coordinate for slot
entries.ISLAND_SAVER_NOTE: Back up, restore, or delete saved island layouts.
entries.ISLAND_SAVER_NO: You must be on the island to use this cheat.
entries.ISLAND_SAVER_NAME_BACKUP: Enter a name for the island backup:
entries.ISLAND_SAVER_DUMPER_DUMP:
Island Saver

Choose whether to back up, restore, or delete an island layout backup.
entries.ISLAND_ONLINE_OPTIONS_NOTE:
Press the hotkey to open up the following options:
Quick join: Join a random island from anywhere
Browse sessions: Display islands that exist on the server, and choose one to join. Trying to join closed or full sessions will fail. Note that in the time it takes between fetching session information and choosing a session to join, the session status might have changed; in that case joining might fail, or you might end up in a different session than the one you selected.
entries.OUT_OF_MEMORY: Not enough memory! Try again from a different room.
entries.NPC_SELECTOR_NOTE: Choose a loaded NPC so the other NPC cheats know which target to use.
entries.NPC_ANIMATION_NOTE: Set an animation type and ID for the selected NPC, then trigger it with the hotkey.
entries.NPC_COORDINATE_NOTE: Move the selected NPC around while holding the modifier key.
entries.NPC_TELEPORT_NOTE: Teleport the selected NPC directly to your current position.
entries.NPC_ROTATION_NOTE: Rotate the selected NPC with the Circle Pad while holding the modifier key.
entries.SIZE_CODES_NOTE: Change the size of players, NPCs, bugs, effects, and other objects.
entries.T_POSE_NOTE: Force the player and every other character (like npc's) into a T-pose.
entries.TAKE_TPC_PIC_NOTE: Create a TPC picture anywhere instantly. You can also freeze the screen to line up the shot first.
entries.MAX_TURBO_NOTE: Lets you hold A, B, X, Y, or the D-Pad to repeat button presses continuously instead of tapping them repeatedly.
entries.MULTI_PRESS_NOTE: Removes the normal button cooldown so you can spam tools and other rapid button actions much faster.
entries.ULTIMATE_POPPER_NOTE: Enhance the Party Popper so it can be spammed and use a custom particle effect.
entries.ULTIMATE_PARTY_POPPER_ENTER_EFFECT: Enter the Party Popper effect ID:
entries.CAMERA_MOD_NOTE:
Move the camera freely.
R + Circle Pad: Rotate camera
R + X: Toggle camera follow
R + Y: Lock or unlock player movement
B + D-Pad: Move camera
entries.FISH_ALWAYS_BITE_NOTE: Fish bite immediately instead of waiting.
entries.FISH_CANT_SCARE_NOTE: Fish won't flee when you run nearby.
entries.CHAT_DONT_DISSAPEAR_NOTE: Keep chat bubbles on screen until a new message replaces them.
entries.FORCE_CHAT_NOTE: Send the current chat message immediately while holding the hotkey.
entries.SHOP_ALWAYS_OPEN_NOTE: Remove shop closing times so stores stay open at all hours.
entries.DISABLE_SAVE_NOTE: Disable the save menu opened with the START button.
entries.DISABLE_ITEM_LOCKS_NOTE: Remove the drop delay lock so items can be dropped faster.
entries.CANT_FALL_HOLE: No Falling Into Holes or Pitfalls
entries.CANT_FALL_HOLE_NOTE: Prevent the player from falling into holes and pitfalls.
entries.SET_SPOT_STATE_NOTE: Lock or unlock the current spot, or apply the change across the whole map.
entries.SEARCH_REPLACE_NOTE:
Replace every matching item on the map with a different item.
Use 0xFFFFFFFF to search for everything.
entries.QUICK_MENU_SEARCH_REPLACE_SEARCH:
Enter the item ID to search for.
Use 0xFFFFFFFF to replace everything:
entries.QUICK_MENU_SEARCH_REPLACE_REPLACE: Enter the item ID to place instead:
entries.REMOVE_MAP_ITEMS_NOTE: Remove all map items in the current area.
entries.REMOVE_ITEM_WARNING:
Warning
This will remove every item on the map.
Press Yes to continue or No to cancel.
entries.EDIT_PATTERN_NOTE: Make every pattern count as yours so you can edit it.
entries.GRASS_EDITOR_NOTE: Edit grass at your current position or fill and clear the entire map at once.
entries.GRASS_EDITOR_KB1: Choose how to edit grass across the whole map:
entries.GRASS_EDITOR_KB2: - Fill grass across the whole map
entries.GRASS_EDITOR_KB3: - Clear grass across the whole map
entries.AMIIBO_SPOOFER_NOTE: Pretend to scan any amiibo at any location by choosing its species and villager.
entries.TIME_TRAVEL_NOTE: Move time forward or backward, or jump by a specific amount.
entries.BURIED_INSPECTOR_NOTE: Lets you pick up buried items by hand instead of digging them up.
entries.TOOL_ANIM_NOTE: Replace normal tool animations with a custom animation ID.
entries.TOOL_ANIM_ENTER_ANIM:
Enter the animation ID.
Type 0 to reset.
entries.GAME_TYPE_NOTE: Change the current game mode. For example, Online (Island) lets you send friend requests on the online island.
entries.ALWAYS_AURORA_MOD_NOTE: Force aurora lights to appear regardless of time, date, season, or weather.
entries.MORE_NUMBERS_NOTE: Let the online island keyboard accept more than 3 digits.
entries.LARGE_FOV_NOTE: Widen the field of view so more of the room is visible.
entries.MOVE_FURN_NOTE: Move furniture in any building, including places that normally restrict it. Works online.
entries.WALK_TALK_NOTE: Move around while talking to NPCs, reading signs, and similar interactions.
entries.KEY_EXTEND_NOTE: Remove the normal character limit from the keyboard.
entries.CUSTOM_KEY_NOTE: Replace the keyboard character set with custom symbols.
entries.BEANS_PARTICLE_NOTE: Change the particle effect created by beans.
entries.DAYTIME_NOTE: Applies daytime lighting to make the game much brighter at night.
entries.FAST_MODE_NOTE: Run supported actions at double speed.
entries.FAST_TEXT_SPEED_NOTE: Speed up dialogue and text boxes.
entries.FAST_GAME_SPEED_NOTE: Speed up the overall game simulation.
entries.FAST_ISABELLE_NOTE: Enable fast text and fast game speed while in Isabelle's greeting room.
entries.RESTORE_NOFILES:
Error
Couldn't find any files to restore.
entries.FILE_PROMPT: Do you really want to delete %s?
entries.FILE_RES2:
Error
Couldn't find any files to delete.
entries.SAVE_REMINDER_MESSAGE: Reminder: Don't forget to save your game! 
entries.SCAM_BODY1: This plugin is free and open-source. It must not be sold, neither alone nor as part of a bundle.
entries.SCAM_BODY2: If you paid for this plugin or received it as part of a paid bundle, you have been scammed. Demand your money back.
entries.KEEP_CONN_PLAYER_LEAVING: A player wants to leave the island! Closing menu...
entries.KEEP_CONN_PLAYER_JOINING: A player wants to join the island! Closing menu...
